subcodes.first_line: God testifieth that there is none other God but Him. He hath appeared and manifested His Cause as He willeth and desireth, and He is the Desired One [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: شهد الله انه لا اله الا هو قد ظهر و اظهر امره کیف شاء و اراد و هو المراد فی
subcodes.subjects: @Word of God and human limitations, @sacrifice of self; mystery of sacrifice, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @high station of the true believer
